pages.text:
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

24 MARS

¼& 1986 : 8비

الموافق :

الهيئة العامة لشئون الزراعة والثروة السمكية

رقم القيد A-H-D_48-105 -1366

رقم الملف المرفقات

Director General 0IE 12 Rue De Prony 75017 Paris

France.

Dear DI. Blajan,

With pleasure and gratitude I would like to inform

you that the Government of Kuwait has approved the request of membership to the office.

All membership formalities has been completed,

category 6 selected and the contribution under process, in due time will be at your hands.

Again I congratulate you and myself hoping that

we make use of your efforts to develop our Veterinary Services and have full utilization of all the facilities your office provide. Awaiting to receive an invitation to the coming general session after you receive the completed formalities.

Thanks with gratitude,

N.B: The invitation must be send to the Director

General on the same address.

د. سلطان احمد سلطان الغلق

Silla

مدير ادارة الصحة الحيوانية

(Dr. Sultan A.Al Sultan)

Director

Animal Health Department

P.O.Box No.21422 13075 Safat Kuwait.
